source_name: Common Core Grade 7 — Ratios and Proportional Relationships

criteria.criterion_statement: I can compute unit rates from ratios involving whole numbers and simple fractions with like units.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt to compute unit rates.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts unit rate computation but makes significant errors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Computes unit rates with minor errors or incomplete work.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately computes unit rates from ratios with whole numbers and simple fractions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Efficiently computes unit rates using multiple solution strategies.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding what a unit rate is and its characteristics is required before computing unit rates from ratios.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can compute unit rates from ratios involving complex fractions and different units of measurement.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt with complex fractions or different units.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts but struggles with complex fraction manipulation or unit conversion.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Computes unit rates with complex fractions but makes occasional errors.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately computes unit rates from complex fractions and handles different units correctly.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of unit relationships and fraction operations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Conceptual understanding of unit rates must precede computation with complex fractions and different units.
Simple unit rate computation with whole numbers should be mastered before complex fractions and different units.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can express quantities and time intervals as complex fractions and simplify to rates per single unit of time.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt to work with time-based rates.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts to set up complex fractions but struggles with simplification.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sets up complex fractions correctly but makes errors in simplification.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately expresses time intervals as complex fractions and simplifies to unit rates.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates fluency with multiple time units and complex rate calculations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding unit rate characteristics is essential before expressing time intervals as rates per single unit.
Complex fraction computation provides foundation for expressing time intervals as complex fractions.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain what a unit rate is and identify its key characteristics.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot define unit rate or identify characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Provides incomplete or unclear definition of unit rate.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Defines unit rate with minor gaps or imprecision.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains unit rate as quantity per single unit with accurate characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Provides comprehensive definition with multiple examples and connections.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain how unit rates relate to ratios of quantities including fractions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot connect unit rates to ratios.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Shows limited understanding of unit rate-ratio connections.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Explains basic relationship between unit rates and simple ratios.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains how unit rates derive from ratios including fractional quantities.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates deep understanding with complex fractional ratio examples.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can test for equivalent ratios in tables or data to determine if two quantities are in a proportional relationship.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts to find ratios but makes calculation errors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Correctly calculates some ratios but struggles with equivalence testing.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically tests equivalent ratios to accurately determine proportional relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Efficiently identifies patterns and explains reasoning behind ratio equivalence.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding how unit rates relate to ratios supports recognition of proportional relationships.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can analyze graphs on a coordinate plane to determine if two quantities are in a proportional relationship by checking for a straight line through the origin.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies lines but misses origin requirement.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Recognizes straight lines through origin but inconsistent application.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies proportional relationships by analyzing linearity and origin passage.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains why origin passage indicates proportionality and connects to ratio concepts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can analyze proportional relationships to identify their characteristics and structure.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies some basic features of proportional relationships with support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies key characteristics like constant ratios in simple proportional relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Systematically analyzes proportional relationships to identify structure, constant ratios, and key characteristics.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyzes complex proportional relationships and explains underlying mathematical structure.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Must be able to recognize proportional relationships before analyzing their characteristics and structure.
Graph analysis for proportionality is required before deeper analysis of proportional relationship characteristics.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can represent proportional relationships using tables, graphs, equations, and other mathematical forms.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot create mathematical representations of proportional relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Creates basic representations with significant support and guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Creates accurate representations using one or two mathematical forms consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Fluently represents proportional relationships using multiple forms including tables, graphs, and equations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Creates sophisticated representations and connects between multiple mathematical forms seamlessly.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding characteristics of proportional relationships is required before representing them in multiple forms.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify the constant of proportionality across tables, graphs, equations, diagrams, and verbal descriptions.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify constant of proportionality in any representation.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies constant of proportionality in one familiar representation with support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies constant of proportionality in tables and simple equations with minor errors.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies constant of proportionality across tables, graphs, equations, diagrams, and verbal descriptions.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies constant of proportionality in complex or unfamiliar representations.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Must recognize proportional relationships exist before identifying the constant of proportionality within them.
Graph analysis for proportionality provides foundation for identifying constants of proportionality in graphs.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can write equations using the constant of proportionality to represent proportional relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts to write equations but makes errors with constants.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Writes basic proportional equations with some guidance needed.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Correctly writes equations using constant of proportionality for various proportional relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Writes complex proportional equations and explains variable relationships.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Must identify the constant of proportionality before using it to write equations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can interpret ordered pairs and points on graphs of proportional relationships in terms of the situation.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies coordinates but struggles with situational meaning.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Interprets some ordered pairs with partial understanding of context.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Correctly interprets ordered pairs including origin and unit rate points in situational context.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains deeper meaning of coordinate relationships and patterns.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Understanding the constant of proportionality is required to interpret points on proportional relationship graphs.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can solve multistep ratio problems involving proportional relationships.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt at ratio problem solving.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts ratio problems but makes significant computational or conceptual errors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Solves simple ratio problems but struggles with multistep processes.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Successfully solves multistep ratio problems using appropriate proportional reasoning and accurate calculations.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Efficiently solves complex ratio problems and explains reasoning clearly.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Unit rate computation is a fundamental tool needed for solving multistep ratio problems.
Must recognize when proportional relationships apply before selecting them as solution strategies.
Writing equations with constants of proportionality is required for equation-based multistep problem solving.
Representational fluency with tables, graphs, and equations is required to set up multistep problems.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can solve multistep percent problems including interest, tax, markups, markdowns, gratuities, commissions, fees, percent change, and percent error.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No attempt at percent problem solving.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts percent problems but makes significant computational or conceptual errors.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Solves basic percent problems but struggles with multistep applications.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Successfully solves multistep percent problems across various contexts with accurate calculations and appropriate methods.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Efficiently solves complex percent problems and connects solutions to real-world meaning.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Unit rate concept is foundational for percent applications (percent as a rate per 100).
Proportional relationship recognition (via ratio tables) supports setting up percent problem structures.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify proportional relationships within real-world problem contexts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot recognize proportional relationships in problems.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Recognizes some proportional relationships with significant support.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Identifies proportional relationships in familiar contexts with minor errors.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Accurately identifies proportional relationships in various real-world contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Identifies complex proportional relationships in novel contexts.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Recognizing proportional relationships in formal contexts (tables) is prerequisite to recognizing them in real-world contexts.
Recognizing proportional relationships via graphs supports recognition in varied real-world representations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can apply proportional relationships to solve multistep real-world and mathematical problems.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot solve problems using proportional relationships.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Solves simple proportional problems with extensive guidance.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Solves multistep proportional problems with some computational errors.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Successfully solves complex multistep problems using proportional relationships with accurate reasoning.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Solves sophisticated problems and explains solution strategies.

prerequisite_edges_detail.rationale: Procedural fluency in structured multistep problems should precede real-world application.
Multiple representation skills are required for contextual application of proportional relationships.
Must identify proportional relationships in contexts before applying them to solve problems.
